_comment: vsomeip config for the av-stack Adaptive Applications (ara::com SOME/IP backend). Selected with VSOMEIP_CONFIGURATION=.../vsomeip-av.json. NOTE: the Adaptive-AUTOSAR runtime creates ONE vsomeip application for its skeletons (server) and ONE for its proxies (client) PER PROCESS, named from ADAPTIVE_AUTOSAR_VSOMEIP_SERVER_APP / ADAPTIVE_AUTOSAR_VSOMEIP_CLIENT_APP (see vsomeip_application.cpp) — NOT from VSOMEIP_APPLICATION_NAME. run_ap.sh sets those per process to <app>_server / <app>_client so each vsomeip app gets a fixed client id below, instead of all sharing the generic adaptive_autosar_{server,client} names and contending for dynamic ids (which caused ID collisions + ghost-client reconnect loops across the init->run transition). Servers = 0x110x, clients = 0x111x.
